title: Saudi Wagyu Burger
description: A rich and savory Arabian-inspired burger featuring wagyu beef and topped with indulgent ingredients.
instructions: Form wagyu beef into 4 patties and season with salt and pepper.
Grill wagyu beef patties for 4-5 minutes per side or until cooked to desired temperature.
While wagyu beef is cooking, caramelize onions by heating 2 tablespoons of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add 1 large onion to the pan and cook for 20-25 minutes or until caramelized.
Toast brioche buns by grilling for 2-3 minutes or until lightly toasted.
Assemble burgers by spreading Spiced Arabian Sauce on the bottom bun.
Add a wagyu beef patty, a few slices of Wagyu Beef Bacon, a slice of Cheddar Cheese, and a sprinkle of Feta Cheese.
Top with caramelized onions and mixed greens.
Finish with a dollop of Spiced Arabian Sauce and a sprinkle of crushed Pita Chips.
